turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, do you have an ICU at Sunrise? I'm asking because my father might need to be admitted soon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have a fully equipped ICU with 12 beds and round-the-clock intensivist coverage. We also have a Cardiac Care Unit adjacent to it.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Is the ICU private or general? Can family visit?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have both general and private ICU rooms. Family visits are allowed during designated hours — typically 12 PM to 1 PM and 5 PM to 6 PM — to maintain sterile conditions.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And what's the daily cost approximately?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: ICU charges vary based on the type of room and care required. General ICU starts at around 4,500 rupees per day and private ICU from 7,500 rupees. Our admissions team can give you a detailed estimate based on your father's specific condition.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you. I'll be in touch soon.
